name: Varrio Hawthorne Lil Watts (LWS)
description: The most asked question about this barrio is “why do they call themselves Lil Watts when they are in Hawthorne, several miles southwest from Watts?” The answer to that question is related to when they actually formed. During the late 1960s, several guys from Hawthorne began a barrio in the most run down section of Hawthorne and it was Watts that had a reputation of being an area of Los Angeles that was most feared.
